name: Strawberry Bran Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Add the corn syrup and egg, mixing well to combine.
3. Stir in the bran cereal.
4. Combine the flour, baking soda, and salt.
5. Press half of the dough evenly into a 9x9x2 inch pan.
6. Spread the strawberry jam over the top of the dough.
7. Place the remaining dough on top of the jam.
8. Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes.
